proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009 == 1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_022 == 1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_024 == 1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_014 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_009 == 1`: mean dependency_BRAF was -0.805 in the subgroup (n=5574) versus -0.250 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.555, Welch p=<1e-300.
`feature_022 == 1`: mean dependency_EGFR was -0.601 in the subgroup (n=3880) versus -0.252 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.349, Welch p=<1e-300.
`feature_024 == 1`: mean dependency_ERBB2 was -0.686 in the subgroup (n=4890) versus -0.253 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.432, Welch p=<1e-300.
`feature_014 == 1`: mean dependency_KRAS was -0.559 in the subgroup (n=11842) versus -0.252 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.307, Welch p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Skin-lineage cell lines (`feature_011 == skin`) have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than non-skin cell lines.
Cell lines satisfying both `feature_009 == 1` and `feature_011 == skin` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than all other cell lines.

Cell lines satisfying both `feature_014 == 1` and `feature_011 == pancreatic` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than all other cell lines, and pancreatic lineage further strengthens the `feature_014` effect.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_011 == skin`: mean dependency_BRAF was -0.472 in the subgroup (n=4935) versus -0.294 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.178, Welch p=2.55e-151.
`feature_009 == 1` and skin lineage: mean dependency_BRAF was -0.811 in the subgroup (n=1966) versus -0.291 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.520, Welch p=<1e-300.
`feature_014 == 1` and pancreatic lineage: mean dependency_KRAS was -0.559 in the subgroup (n=2913) versus -0.310 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.249, Welch p=6.43e-251.
`feature_014:pancreatic` interaction: OLS coefficient for dependency_KRAS was -0.003 (SE 0.011, p=0.795).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_027 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027 == 0`.
Colorectal cell lines (`feature_011 == colorectal`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_035 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `feature_035 == 0`.
Cell lines with high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_027 == 1`: mean dependency_RIT1 was -0.353 in the subgroup (n=4560) versus -0.257 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.096, Welch p=1.55e-68.
`feature_011 == colorectal`: mean dependency_KIF18A was -0.720 in the subgroup (n=5816) versus -0.252 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.468, Welch p=<1e-300.
`feature_035 == 1`: mean dependency_KIF18A was -0.545 in the subgroup (n=9285) versus -0.253 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.292, Welch p=<1e-300.
`feature_028 >= 0.819`: mean dependency_KIF18A was -0.469 in the subgroup (n=12508) versus -0.253 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.217, Welch p=<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011 == colorectal`, `feature_035 == 1`, and high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) have much more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.
Within colorectal cell lines, the complete subgroup `feature_035 == 1` and `feature_028 >= 0.819` has more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other colorectal cell lines.
The combination `feature_011 == colorectal`, `feature_035 == 1`, and `feature_028 >= 0.819` has a negative three-way interaction for `dependency_KIF18A`, beyond the lower-order terms.

analyses.result_summary: colorectal AND `feature_035 == 1` AND `feature_028 >= 0.819`: mean dependency_KIF18A was -1.112 in the subgroup (n=3133) versus -0.253 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.859, Welch p=<1e-300.
Within colorectal lines, the complete subgroup mean `dependency_KIF18A` was -1.112 (n=3133) versus -0.263 in other colorectal lines (n=2683); signed difference -0.849, p=<1e-300.
three-way KIF18A interaction: OLS coefficient for dependency_KIF18A was -0.818 (SE 0.025, p=5.37e-225).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 0.964`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_016 >= 0.964`: mean dependency_TMED10 was -0.282 in the subgroup (n=12577) versus -0.245 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.037, Welch p=2.52e-24.
`feature_016 >= 0.964`: mean dependency_DHX9 was -0.361 in the subgroup (n=12577) versus -0.324 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.037, Welch p=1.71e-24.
`feature_016 >= 0.964`: mean dependency_POLR2A was -0.497 in the subgroup (n=12577) versus -0.393 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.104, Welch p=1.01e-179.
`feature_016 >= 0.964`: mean dependency_RPL11 was -0.301 in the subgroup (n=12577) versus -0.259 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.042, Welch p=6.57e-30.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high `feature_003` (`feature_003 >= 0.428`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_018 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `feature_018 == 0`.
Cell lines with high `feature_023` (`feature_023 >= 5.669`) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.
In a multivariable main-effect model, `feature_003` remains a negative independent predictor of `dependency_RPL11`, whereas `feature_018` is not independently negative after adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_003 >= 0.428`: mean dependency_RPL11 was -0.344 in the subgroup (n=12501) versus -0.245 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.099, Welch p=7.61e-160.
`feature_018 == 1`: mean dependency_RPL11 was -0.361 in the subgroup (n=8055) versus -0.252 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.109, Welch p=5.71e-140.
`feature_023 >= 5.669`: mean dependency_DHX9 was -0.355 in the subgroup (n=12501) versus -0.327 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.029, Welch p=2.05e-15.
adjusted `feature_003_z` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_RPL11 was -0.056 (SE 0.002, p=1.8e-120).
adjusted `feature_018` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_RPL11 was 0.009 (SE 0.007, p=0.177).

proposed_hypotheses.text: An exhaustive one-to-three-predicate subgroup search for `dependency_BRAF` will find a more-negative subgroup containing `feature_009 == 1`; the top tested subgroup is `feature_009 == 1`, `feature_026 >= 1.080`, and `feature_033 >= 0.602`.

An exhaustive one-to-three-predicate subgroup search for `dependency_EGFR` will find a more-negative subgroup containing `feature_022 == 1`; the top tested subgroup is `feature_004 == adherent`, `feature_016 >= 0.964`, and `feature_022 == 1`.

An exhaustive one-to-three-predicate subgroup search for `dependency_ERBB2` will find a more-negative subgroup containing `feature_024 == 1`; the top tested subgroup is `feature_023 >= 5.669`, `feature_024 == 1`, and `feature_026 >= 1.080`.

An exhaustive one-to-three-predicate subgroup search for `dependency_KRAS` will find a more-negative subgroup containing `feature_014 == 1`; the top tested subgroup is `feature_014 == 1`, `feature_016 >= 0.964`, and low `feature_028`.
For `dependency_RIT1`, the subgroup `feature_011 == brain` and `feature_027 == 1` has more negative scores than other cell lines, and brain lineage negatively modifies the `feature_027` effect.

analyses.method: Systematic subgroup search plus Welch t-test
analyses.result_summary: top BRAF search subgroup: mean dependency_BRAF was -0.863 in the subgroup (n=387) versus -0.307 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.555, Welch p=1.16e-111.

analyses.method: Systematic subgroup search plus Welch t-test
analyses.result_summary: top EGFR search subgroup: mean dependency_EGFR was -0.642 in the subgroup (n=773) versus -0.274 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.368, Welch p=4.6e-126.

analyses.method: Systematic subgroup search plus Welch t-test
analyses.result_summary: top ERBB2 search subgroup: mean dependency_ERBB2 was -0.746 in the subgroup (n=303) versus -0.293 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.453, Welch p=2.16e-66.

analyses.method: Systematic subgroup search plus Welch t-test
analyses.result_summary: top KRAS search subgroup: mean dependency_KRAS was -0.630 in the subgroup (n=678) versus -0.321 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.309, Welch p=1.28e-84.

analyses.method: Systematic subgroup search plus Welch t-test
analyses.result_summary: top RIT1 search subgroup: mean dependency_RIT1 was -0.405 in the subgroup (n=329) versus -0.265 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.140, Welch p=1.01e-12.
`feature_027:brain` interaction: OLS coefficient for dependency_RIT1 was -0.058 (SE 0.021, p=0.00564).

proposed_hypotheses.text: For `dependency_KIF18A`, exhaustive subgroup search will nominate the complete subgroup `feature_011 == colorectal`, `feature_035 == 1`, and `feature_028 >= 0.819` as the most concentrated dependency subgroup.

analyses.method: Systematic subgroup search plus Welch t-test
analyses.result_summary: top KIF18A search subgroup: mean dependency_KIF18A was -1.112 in the subgroup (n=3133) versus -0.253 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.859, Welch p=<1e-300.
top KIF18A three-way interaction: OLS coefficient for dependency_KIF18A was -0.818 (SE 0.025, p=5.37e-225).

proposed_hypotheses.text: For `dependency_TMED10`, the subgroup `feature_016 >= 0.964`, `feature_027 == 1`, and `feature_017 <= 1.956` has more negative scores than other cell lines.
For `dependency_DHX9`, the subgroup `feature_010 == squamous`, `feature_023 >= 5.669`, and `feature_029 == 0` has more negative scores than other cell lines.
For `dependency_POLR2A`, the subgroup `feature_011 == skin`, `feature_016 >= 0.964`, and `feature_026 >= 1.080` has more negative scores than other cell lines.
For `dependency_RPL11`, the subgroup `feature_018 == 1`, `feature_016 >= 0.964`, and `feature_031 >= 0.654` has more negative scores than other cell lines.

analyses.method: Systematic subgroup search plus Welch t-test
analyses.result_summary: top TMED10 search subgroup: mean dependency_TMED10 was -0.356 in the subgroup (n=307) versus -0.253 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.102, Welch p=6.88e-08.
TMED10 three-way interaction: OLS coefficient for dependency_TMED10 was -0.071 (SE 0.029, p=0.0125).

analyses.method: Systematic subgroup search plus Welch t-test
analyses.result_summary: top DHX9 search subgroup: mean dependency_DHX9 was -0.417 in the subgroup (n=488) versus -0.333 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.084, Welch p=1.57e-07.
`feature_016 high:feature_023 high` interaction: OLS coefficient for dependency_DHX9 was -0.013 (SE 0.008, p=0.107).

analyses.method: Systematic subgroup search plus Welch t-test
analyses.result_summary: top POLR2A search subgroup: mean dependency_POLR2A was -0.547 in the subgroup (n=315) versus -0.418 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.129, Welch p=2.43e-10.
POLR2A three-way interaction: OLS coefficient for dependency_POLR2A was -0.023 (SE 0.028, p=0.416).

analyses.method: Systematic subgroup search plus Welch t-test
analyses.result_summary: top RPL11 search subgroup: mean dependency_RPL11 was -0.419 in the subgroup (n=609) versus -0.268 in all other lines; signed mean difference -0.151, Welch p=1.48e-24.
RPL11 three-way interaction: OLS coefficient for dependency_RPL11 was -0.021 (SE 0.022, p=0.332).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable main-effect model, the driver-like flags `feature_009`, `feature_022`, `feature_024`, `feature_014`, and `feature_027` remain negative independent predictors of `dependency_BRAF`, `dependency_EGFR`, `dependency_ERBB2`, `dependency_KRAS`, and `dependency_RIT1`, respectively.

In a multivariable main-effect model for `dependency_KIF18A`, colorectal lineage (`feature_011 == colorectal`), `feature_035`, and standardized `feature_028` each remain negative independent predictors.

In multivariable main-effect models, standardized `feature_016` remains negatively associated with `dependency_TMED10`, `dependency_DHX9`, and `dependency_POLR2A`, while `dependency_RPL11` is independently associated with standardized `feature_003` rather than `feature_018`.

analyses.result_summary: adjusted `feature_009` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_BRAF was -0.554 (SE 0.005, p=<1e-300).
adjusted `feature_022` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_EGFR was -0.349 (SE 0.006, p=<1e-300).
adjusted `feature_024` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_ERBB2 was -0.433 (SE 0.005, p=<1e-300).
adjusted `feature_014` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_KRAS was -0.310 (SE 0.004, p=<1e-300).
adjusted `feature_027` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_RIT1 was -0.095 (SE 0.005, p=6.13e-69).
adjusted colorectal coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_KIF18A was -0.371 (SE 0.009, p=<1e-300).
adjusted `feature_035` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_KIF18A was -0.122 (SE 0.005, p=6.14e-115).
adjusted `feature_028_z` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_KIF18A was -0.029 (SE 0.002, p=1.81e-35).
adjusted `feature_016_z` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_TMED10 was -0.020 (SE 0.002, p=2.38e-38).
adjusted `feature_016_z` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_DHX9 was -0.021 (SE 0.002, p=1e-42).
adjusted `feature_023_z` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_DHX9 was -0.017 (SE 0.002, p=1.8e-24).
adjusted `feature_016_z` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_POLR2A was -0.061 (SE 0.002, p=<1e-300).
adjusted `feature_003_z` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_RPL11 was -0.056 (SE 0.002, p=1.8e-120).
adjusted `feature_018` coefficient: OLS coefficient for dependency_RPL11 was 0.009 (SE 0.007, p=0.177).
